svg.text: Every run, placed by its first-round dials — pressure predicts who moved
one dot per run (67 modelable runs, all five experiment families); color = observed endpoint
Runs move when they start away from both axes — pressure |ρ·σ| ≈ 0 predicts standing still.
dashed curves: constant per-round selection pressure |ρ·σ|
round-1 agreement ρ = correlation of judge scores with candidate value scores (−1 disagreement → +1 lockstep)
round-1 spread σ = within-prompt SD of candidate value scores
judge forced to fight the value —
self-only, ρ ≈ 0: near-zero pressure — moves scatter both ways
strong selection drives the value UP
off-plane: the σ=0 injection twin has no within-pool spread,
so ρ is undefined — and its value held at 1.00 (no spread, no move)
the value by about ρ·σ. The
Source: experiments/spread_util_unified.json — round-1 record per run key cond|seed|source; 74 runs total, 7 with undefined round-1 ρ (zero spread) not plottable.
Mixed pools also carry a supplier shift not shown on these two axes.
